接口 IRestDocTemplate

所有超级接口:
IBaseDocBuildTemplate
所有已知实现类:
JAXRSDocBuildTemplate, SolonDocBuildTemplate, SpringBootDocBuildTemplate
public interface IRestDocTemplate extends IBaseDocBuildTemplate
Rest api doc template

  • 字段概要

    字段
    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明
    static final AtomicInteger
    ATOMIC_INTEGER
    Atomic integer.
    static final Logger
    log
    Logger for the class.

    从接口继承的方法 IBaseDocBuildTemplate

    buildReturnApiParams, convertParamsDataToTree, getJavaParameterList, getMethodReturnType, getRewriteClassName, ignoreParamsSets, ignoreReturnObject, paramCommentResolve, replaceTypeName

  • 字段详细资料

    • log

      static final Logger log
      Logger for the class.

    • ATOMIC_INTEGER

      Atomic integer.

  • 方法详细资料

    • processApiData

      default ApiSchema<ApiDoc> processApiData(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations, List<ApiReqParam> configApiReqParams, IRequestMappingHandler baseMappingHandler, IHeaderHandler headerHandler, Collection<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass> javaClasses)
      Processes API data to generate documentation schemas.
      参数:
      projectBuilder - Configuration builder for the project, used to obtain project configuration information.
      frameworkAnnotations - Framework annotation processor, used to handle framework-specific annotations.
      configApiReqParams - Configuration list of request parameters, used to process request parameters.
      baseMappingHandler - Request mapping handler, used to process request mapping information.
      headerHandler - Header handler, used to process header information.
      javaClasses - Collection of Java classes, used to scan and process classes that need to generate documentation.
      返回:
      Returns the generated API documentation schema.

    • createDocRenderHeaders

      default String createDocRenderHeaders(List<ApiReqParam> headers, boolean isAdoc)
      Generates a string for document header rendering based on the list of request parameters. If the header list is empty, it initializes it to an empty list to avoid null pointer issues. This method is primarily used for creating API documentation table headers, with columns including parameter name, type, whether it's required, description, and since version.
      参数:
      headers - A list of ApiReqParam objects representing the request headers. Each object contains details like name, type, requirements, etc.
      isAdoc - A flag indicating whether the output is formatted for AsciiDoc (.adoc) format. Currently, this parameter does not affect the output and is reserved for future use.
      返回:
      A string representing the formatted header information for documentation. If the input list is empty, an empty string is returned.

    • handleApiDoc

      default void handleApiDoc(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, List<ApiDoc> apiDocList, List<ApiMethodDoc> apiMethodDocs, int order, boolean isUseMd5)
      Handles the generation of API documentation. This default method creates API documentation for the provided Java class, including both class-level and method-level details. It constructs API documentation objects and populates them based on the comments associated with the class and its methods.
      参数:
      cls - The Java class to process documentation for.
      apiDocList - A list accumulating all API documentation instances.
      apiMethodDocs - A list of method documentation objects corresponding to the methods within the class.
      order - The sorting order for the generated API documentation entry.
      isUseMd5 - Flag indicating whether to use MD5 hashing to generate a unique alias for the documented class.

    • mappingParamToApiParam

      default void mappingParamToApiParam(String str, List<ApiParam> paramList, Map<String,String> mappingParams)
      Maps the given parameter to an API parameter object. This method processes a string parameter, converting it into an entry in the API parameter list, and simultaneously updates the parameter mapping. It detects if the parameter includes a value assignment (e.g., "name=value"), extracts the name and value accordingly, or treats the entire string as the parameter name if no assignment is found. The parameter's type is determined (either "int32" for positive integers or "string"), and a new `ApiParam` instance is created with details extracted or inferred from the input. The newly created `ApiParam` is then added to the provided list, and its name is recorded in the mappingParams map with a null value.
      参数:
      str - The raw string containing the parameter information.
      paramList - The list of ApiParam objects to which the processed parameter will be added.
      mappingParams - A map holding parameter names as keys, used for tracking mapped parameters.

    • mappingParamProcess

      default void mappingParamProcess(String str, Map<String,String> pathParamsMap)
      Processes a parameter string, extracting or inferring its name and value, then adds it to a path parameters map. This method handles a raw string that represents a parameter. If the string includes an equals sign, indicating a value assignment, it separates the parameter name and value accordingly. Otherwise, it assumes the entire string is the parameter name and infers a default value based on the type "string". The resulting parameter name-value pair is then stored in the provided pathParamsMap.
      参数:
      str - The raw string containing the parameter information potentially with a value assignment.
      pathParamsMap - A map to store path parameter names paired with their respective values.

    • getParamName

      default String getParamName(ClassLoader classLoader, String paramName, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation annotation)
      Retrieves the parameter name from an annotation, considering both 'value' and 'name' properties, and removes any surrounding quotes from the resolved name.
      参数:
      classLoader - The ClassLoader used to load classes for annotation resolution.
      paramName - The default parameter name.
      annotation - The annotation instance containing the parameter name information.
      返回:
      The resolved and cleaned parameter name, or the default if not specified in the annotation.

    • handleTagsApiDoc

      default List<ApiDoc> handleTagsApiDoc(List<ApiDoc> apiDocList)
      Processes the API documentation tags, consolidating API documents with identical tags.
      参数:
      apiDocList - The original list of API documentation.
      返回:
      A processed list of API documentation, sorted and merged by tags.

    • getClassAnnotations

      default List<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation> getClassAnnotations(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Retrieves the annotations of the specified class, including those inherited from its superclasses and interfaces, but only considering mapping annotations for inheritance.

      This method first checks if the specified class has both entry and mapping annotations. If it does, it returns the annotations of the class directly. If not, it recursively retrieves the mapping annotations from its superclasses and interfaces.

      参数:
      cls - the class whose annotations are to be retrieved
      frameworkAnnotations - the framework annotations to be used for filtering
      返回:
      a list of annotations for the specified class, including inherited mapping annotations

    • getClassAnnotations

      default List<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation> getClassAnnotations(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, Map<String, MappingAnnotation> mappingAnnotationMap)
      Retrieves the annotations of the specified class, including those inherited from its superclasses and interfaces, but only considering mapping annotations for inheritance.

      This method retrieves the annotations of the specified class and recursively collects mapping annotations from its superclasses and interfaces.

      参数:
      cls - the class whose annotations are to be retrieved
      mappingAnnotationMap - the map of mapping annotations used to filter and inherit annotations
      返回:
      a list of annotations for the specified class, including inherited mapping annotations

    • buildExceptionStatus

      default List<ApiExceptionStatus> buildExceptionStatus(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, Collection<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass> javaClasses, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Constructs a list of exception statuses based on the provided project configuration builder, collection of Java classes, and framework annotations. This method primarily parses exception handling methods within Java classes and generates corresponding exception status configurations from these method details.
      参数:
      projectBuilder - The project configuration builder to retrieve project-related configuration information.
      javaClasses - A collection of Java classes from which exception handling methods are parsed.
      frameworkAnnotations - A collection of framework annotations used to determine if certain classes or methods should be ignored.
      返回:
      A list of ApiExceptionStatus objects representing all parsed exception handling methods and their associated status information.

    • buildEntryPointMethod

      default List<ApiMethodDoc> buildEntryPointMethod(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, ApiConfig apiConfig, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations, List<ApiReqParam> configApiReqParams, IRequestMappingHandler baseMappingHandler, IHeaderHandler headerHandler)
      Builds entry point method documentation. Generates API method documentation for the specified class, including all its methods and inherited methods that meet the documentation generation criteria.
      参数:
      cls - The class to generate documentation for.
      apiConfig - The API configuration information.
      projectBuilder - Configuration builder for the project, used to obtain project-related configuration.
      frameworkAnnotations - Framework annotation information, used to handle mapping annotations.
      configApiReqParams - Configured request parameters, used to generate API request parameter documentation.
      baseMappingHandler - Handles request mapping annotations, used to process URL and HTTP method information.
      headerHandler - Handles request headers, used to generate request header documentation.
      返回:
      A list of API method documentation.

    • requestParams

      default ApiMethodReqParam requestParams(DocJavaMethod docJavaMethod, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, List<ApiReqParam> configApiReqParams, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      build request params
      参数:
      docJavaMethod - docJavaMethod
      builder - projectBuilder
      configApiReqParams - configApiReqParams
      frameworkAnnotations - frameworkAnnotations
      返回:
      ApiMethodReqParam

    • buildReqJson

      default ApiRequestExample buildReqJson(DocJavaMethod javaMethod, ApiMethodDoc apiMethodDoc, ProjectDocConfigBuilder configBuilder, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      build request json
      参数:
      javaMethod - JavaMethod
      apiMethodDoc - ApiMethodDoc
      configBuilder - ProjectDocConfigBuilder
      frameworkAnnotations - FrameworkAnnotations
      返回:
      ApiRequestExample

    • defaultEntryPoint

      default boolean defaultEntryPoint(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Determines if the given Java class is a default entry point based on its annotations and the provided framework annotations.
      参数:
      cls - the Java class to check
      frameworkAnnotations - the framework annotations to use for the check
      返回:
      true if the class is a default entry point, false otherwise

    • defaultExceptionAdviceEntryPoint

      default boolean defaultExceptionAdviceEntryPoint(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Determines if the given Java class is an exception advice entry point based on its annotations and the provided framework annotations.
      参数:
      cls - the Java class to check
      frameworkAnnotations - the framework annotations to use for the check
      返回:
      true if the class is an exception advice entry point, false otherwise

    • getParentsClassMethods

      default List<DocJavaMethod> getParentsClassMethods(ApiConfig apiConfig, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls)
      Get the list of parent class methods for a given Java class.
      参数:
      apiConfig - the API configuration
      projectBuilder - the project builder
      cls - the Java class
      返回:
      the list of parent class methods

    • convertToDocJavaMethod

      default DocJavaMethod convertToDocJavaMethod(ApiConfig apiConfig, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap)
      Convert a Java method to a DocJavaMethod object.
      参数:
      apiConfig - the API configuration
      projectBuilder - the project builder
      method - the Java method to convert
      actualTypesMap - the actual types map
      返回:
      the converted DocJavaMethod object

    • isEntryPoint

      boolean isEntryPoint(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Determines whether the provided Java class is an entry point for RESTful APIs.
      参数:
      javaClass - The Java class to be evaluated.
      frameworkAnnotations - Annotations provided by the framework, which may include information about the entry point or other metadata.
      返回:
      True if the Java class is an entry point for RESTful APIs, false otherwise.

    • isExceptionAdviceEntryPoint

      boolean isExceptionAdviceEntryPoint(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Unified exception handling entry for RESTful APIs.
      参数:
      javaClass - The Java class associated with the API endpoint.
      frameworkAnnotations - Annotations provided by the framework, which may include information about exception handling or other metadata.
      返回:
      The processed result, typically a response tailored for the RESTful API context.

    • listMvcRequestAnnotations

      List<String> listMvcRequestAnnotations()
      List of annotations that indicate the entry point of a RESTful API.
      返回:
      A list of annotations that indicate the entry point of a RESTful API.

    • requestMappingPostProcess

      void requestMappingPostProcess(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, RequestMapping requestMapping)
      Post-process the Java method associated with a RESTful API endpoint.
      参数:
      javaClass - The Java class associated with the API endpoint.
      method - The Java method associated with the API endpoint.
      requestMapping - The RequestMapping annotation associated with the API endpoint.

    • ignoreMvcParamWithAnnotation

      boolean ignoreMvcParamWithAnnotation(String annotation)
      Determine whether a parameter should be ignored in a RESTful API endpoint.
      参数:
      annotation - The annotation associated with the parameter.
      返回:
      True if the parameter should be ignored, false otherwise.

    • processExceptionAdviceMethod

      ExceptionAdviceMethod processExceptionAdviceMethod(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method)
      Process the Java method associated with an exception handler in a RESTful API.
      参数:
      method - The Java method associated with the exception handler.
      返回:
      The processed result, typically a response tailored for the exception handler.

    • defaultHttpErrorStatuses

      List<ApiExceptionStatus> defaultHttpErrorStatuses()
      Default HTTP error statuses for RESTful APIs.
      返回:
      A list of default HTTP error statuses.
